message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'dst_set_expires' sets signal field 'dst_entry.expires', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=dst_entry;field=expires;offset=24] [oracle:assert=dst_entry.expires stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets expires without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
